notes.goals: Live from FIFA. Updated automatically; data through the most recent match. (76/104 matches)
notes.assists: Live from FIFA. Assists are credited only when FIFA's timeline records an Assist event (Type 1) for the pass before the goal — own goals and direct-free-kick goals don't generate one.
notes.saves: Live from ESPN match summaries (FIFA's v3 timeline doesn't carry keeper events). Counts each team's top saver per match; goals conceded are not deducted.
